workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Manage workspaces for projects, teams, or other isolated contexts. Create, configure, and switch between them seamlessly.

openGraph.title: Workspaces
openGraph.description: Organize content across isolated contexts with flexible workspace management.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Manage workspace settings and related content.

openGraph.title: Workspace
openGraph.description: Configure and manage workspace settings and related content.

settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.description: Manage workspace settings sections for configuration, people, and permissions.

openGraph.title: Workspace Settings
openGraph.description: Manage workspace settings sections for configuration, people, and permissions.

settings_workspace.title: Workspace Settings
settings_workspace.description: Update the workspace name, slug, and default workspace preference.

openGraph.title: Workspace Settings
openGraph.description: Update the workspace name, slug, and default workspace preference.

settings_invitations.title: Invitations
settings_invitations.description: Create workspace invitations, review existing links, and track their status.

openGraph.title: Invitations
openGraph.description: Create workspace invitations, review existing links, and track their status.

settings_users.title: Users
settings_users.description: Review workspace members, their roles, and add existing users by ID.

openGraph.description: Review workspace members, their roles, and add existing users by ID.

settings_teams.title: Teams
settings_teams.description: Review the upcoming workspace team management area.

openGraph.description: Review the upcoming workspace team management area.

errors.nameTooLong: Workspace name must be {max} characters or less
errors.nameInvalidCharacters: Workspace name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores
errors.nameUnchanged: New workspace name must be different from current name
errors.duplicateName: A workspace with this name already exists
errors.duplicateSlug: A workspace with this slug already exists
errors.updatePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to update this workspace
errors.confirmationMismatch: Confirmation text does not match workspace name
errors.atLeastOneWorkspace: You must have at least one workspace
errors.defaultWorkspaceDeletionForbidden: Cannot delete default workspace. Set another workspace as default first.
errors.deletePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to delete this workspace
errors.invitationAlreadyExists: A pending invitation for this email already exists
errors.invitationRecipientAlreadyMember: That email already belongs to a workspace member
errors.invitationPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to invite users to this workspace
errors.invitationNotPending: This invitation can no longer be changed
errors.invitationRecipientMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address
errors.invitationEmailVerificationRequired: Verify your primary email before responding to this invitation
errors.invitationAlreadyMember: You already belong to this workspace
errors.memberNotFound: No user was found for that ID
errors.memberAlreadyExists: That user already belongs to this workspace
errors.memberPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to add users to this workspace
errors.memberRoleUpdatePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to update member roles in this workspace
errors.memberRoleUpdateDenied: This member role cannot be changed from this table
errors.memberRoleUnchanged: Choose a different role before saving
errors.workspaceRolePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to assign that workspace role

createDialog.title: Create New Workspace
createDialog.description: Create a workspace to isolate data or contexts for your product (teams, clients, environments).

settingsDialog.title: Workspace Settings
settingsDialog.description: Modify the workspace settings or delete the workspace.
settingsDialog.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

settingsPage.title: Workspace Settings
settingsPage.description: Update the basic workspace details and default workspace preference.
settingsPage.readOnlyNotice: You can review these workspace details, but only admins and owners can update them.
settingsPage.dangerZoneDescription: Delete this workspace permanently when the existing product rules allow it.

settingsForm.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

settingsUsersPage.title: Workspace Users
settingsUsersPage.description: Review the people who currently belong to this workspace and update built-in roles when permitted.
settingsUsersPage.readOnlyNotice: You can review workspace members here, but only admins and owners can add people or change roles in this release.
settingsUsersPage.otherUsersDescription: People other than you are shown in a table for faster scanning.
settingsUsersPage.emptyDescription: This workspace does not have any visible members yet.
settingsUsersPage.othersEmptyDescription: You are the only visible member in this workspace right now.

settingsInvitationsPage.title: Workspace Invitations
settingsInvitationsPage.description: Create shareable invitation links and review invitation activity for this workspace.
settingsInvitationsPage.emptyDescription: Create an invitation to give someone a secure entry point into this workspace.

createInvitationDialog.title: Invite By Email
createInvitationDialog.description: Create a shareable invitation link and choose the role this person should receive.
createInvitationDialog.emailHint: The invitation will require this verified primary email at acceptance time.
createInvitationDialog.roleHint: Choose the role this invitation will grant.
createInvitationDialog.createdDescription: Copy this link and share it with the invited person.

addMemberDialog.title: Add Existing User
addMemberDialog.description: Add an existing account to this workspace immediately and choose their role.
addMemberDialog.userIdHint: Use the exact internal user ID for the account you want to add.
addMemberDialog.roleHint: Choose the role this user will receive.

pendingInvitationsBlock.title: Pending Workspace Invitations
pendingInvitationsBlock.description: These invitations are waiting for your decision.
pendingInvitationsBlock.emptyDescription: You do not have any actionable workspace invitations right now.

pending.label: Pending
pending.description: Review the invitation details and decide whether to join this workspace.

accepted.label: Accepted
accepted.description: This invitation has already been accepted.

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.description: This invitation has already been rejected.

canceled.label: Canceled
canceled.description: This invitation is no longer active.

expired.label: Expired
expired.description: This invitation expired before it was accepted.

recipient-mismatch.label: Email mismatch
recipient-mismatch.description: Sign in with the invited email address to respond to this invitation.

email-verification-required.label: Email verification required
email-verification-required.description: Verify your primary email before accepting or rejecting this invitation.

already-member.label: Already a member
already-member.description: You already belong to this workspace, so no additional action is needed.

settingsPlaceholder.body: This section is visible now so workspace administration has a stable home, but management tools for it are not part of this change yet.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Workspace invitation flows will be added here in a follow-up change.

users.title: Users
users.description: Workspace user management will be added here in a follow-up change.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Workspace team management will be added here in a follow-up change.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Workspace role management will be added here in a follow-up change.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Workspace?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The workspace record will be permanently removed.
deleteDialog.defaultWorkspaceNotice: Default workspaces cannot be deleted. Set another workspace as default first.
deleteDialog.confirmationLabel: To confirm, please type “{name}” below in the box below
deleteDialog.confirmationPlaceholder: Type name of workspace to confirm deletion

emptyState.title: No Workspaces Yet
emptyState.description: Create your first workspace to get started.

create.title: Create a Workspace
create.description: Start by creating a workspace for different aspects of your life like Work, Personal, or Projects.

domain.title: Add your domain logic
domain.description: Extend src/features/ and Prisma models with the entities your app needs; keep each workspace as a boundary for that data.

switch.title: Switch Between Workspaces
switch.description: Use the workspace switcher in the sidebar to move between contexts without losing your place.

card.summary: Use this card to summarize what lives under this workspace once you add your own entities.

switcher.switchError: Unable to switch workspaces right now.

onboarding.title: Create your first workspace
onboarding.description: You do not have access to any workspaces yet. Create one to open the application, or review invitations sent to your account.
